title: EU fumes as Turkey blocks Cyprus from UN climate meeting
summary_full: The European Commission has called on Turkey to reverse its “unacceptable” decision not to invite the Republic of Cyprus to a preparatory meeting ahead of a United Nations climate conference. The 2026 United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP31) will take place in November in Antalya, Turkey, which will also hold the conference presidency. Australia will […]
